# STRAT.057 ? Cynefin Framework (Snowden)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** systems_thinking_applied
**Domain:** SYSTEMS_THINKING_APPLIED
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Clear, complicated, complex, chaotic, disorder domains; different approaches for each; sense-analyze-respond vs probe-sense-respond

## Application
Categorize situation; clear=best practice; complicated=expert; complex=probe; chaotic=act; match approach to domain; avoid one-size-fits-all

## Key Values
- Domain recognition
- Approach matching
- Context sensitivity
- Complexity awareness
- Adaptive methods

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, systems_thinking_applied

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
